commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content:
The sons of Benjamin: Bela, and Bechor, & (a) Iadihel, three.
(a) Gen. 46. this third son is called Asbel: & seven more are there recited. And so in the rest is much difference: but all may be reconciled by such rules as are noted. Chapter 1
